table.style: width:100%; max-width:780px; margin:0 auto; border-collapse:collapse; border:1.5px solid rgba(107,191,78,0.4);

td.style: height:5px; padding:0; line-height:0; font-size:0; background:#6BBF4E;
background:#030a04; padding:12px 20px; border-bottom:1px solid rgba(107,191,78,0.25);
width:70px; vertical-align:middle;
text-align:center; vertical-align:middle;
width:70px; text-align:right; vertical-align:middle;

td.t-att-style: 'width:255px; min-width:255px; vertical-align:top; padding:0; background:#060e08; border-left:4px solid ' + (doc.tier_id.color if doc.tier_id else '#6BBF4E') + ';'

img.t-att-style: 'width:255px; height:345px; display:block; object-fit:cover; object-position:top center; border-top:4px solid ' + (doc.tier_id.color if doc.tier_id else '#6BBF4E') + '; border-bottom:4px solid ' + (doc.tier_id.color if doc.tier_id else '#6BBF4E') + ';'

div.style: width:255px; height:345px; background:#0b1a0e; display:table-cell; text-align:center; vertical-align:middle;

td.style: vertical-align:top; padding:20px 22px 16px 24px; background:#0a1a0c;

span.t-att-style: 'display:inline-block; padding:4px 16px; border-radius:4px; ' + 'background:' + (doc.tier_id.color or '#6BBF4E') + '1A; ' + 'border:1.5px solid ' + (doc.tier_id.color or '#6BBF4E') + '55; ' + 'font-family:Orbitron,sans-serif; font-size:0.62rem; font-weight:700; ' + 'letter-spacing:2px; text-transform:uppercase; ' + 'color:' + (doc.tier_id.color or '#A8E063') + ';'

td.style: height:1.5px; padding:0; background:#6BBF4E;
padding:10px 0 0; vertical-align:middle;
height:2px; padding:0; line-height:0; font-size:0; background:#6BBF4E;
padding:8px 22px; background:#030a04; border-top:1px solid rgba(107,191,78,0.16);
text-align:center; vertical-align:middle;
text-align:right; vertical-align:middle;
